name: dev-tools-toolbox
description: Universal agent-first toolbox with builder tools, vendable packages, and vendable document templates. Project-agnostic by design.
zero_context_protocol: Read _docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md for workflow loops, tool selection, and token efficiency patterns.
Run journal_query to pick up context from the last session.
Run constraint_query with your task profile to load relevant rules.
Choose from builder_tools, packed_authorities, or vendable_packages based on the task.

builder_tools.description: Analysis, patching, and audit tools that stay in the toolbox. Used by agents to work ON projects.

packed_authorities.description: Toolbox-resident packed codices that run from SQLite-backed artifacts with managed cache hydration.

authorities.name: _builderset-authority
authorities.purpose: Packed SQLite authority for AgenticToolboxBuilderSET with runtime/reference content classes and cache-backed execution.
preferred_for: codex export without live repo dependency

vendable_packages.description: Self-contained subprojects that get installed INTO target projects.

packages.name: _app-journal
packages.purpose: SQLite-backed shared journal for notes, dev logs, decisions, and human-agent activity.

packages.name: _manifold-mcp
packages.purpose: Reversible text-evidence-hypergraph package built around evidence bags.

packages.name: _ollama-prompt-lab
packages.purpose: Local prompt evaluation and Ollama model comparison.

packages.name: _constraint-registry
packages.purpose: Atomic constraint registry for the Builder Constraint Contract. Enables surgical injection of task-relevant rules into agent prompts.

vendable_documents.description: Project-agnostic templates and reference docs that can be copied into any new project.

inactive_areas.name: _Possible_Intake
inactive_areas.rule: Staging area for incoming tools. Not a complete tool surface.
